message:
fix: propagate isDemoData in ClusterAdmin universal stat fallback (#7758)

Address Copilot review comments on PR #7675:
1. Fix misleading comment — useUniversalStats shares a module-level
   cache, not a lazy reader
2. Pass isDemo in the default case so createMergedStatValueGetter
   propagates demo state to universal stat blocks (nodes, warnings, etc.)

Fixes #7738

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
